title: UConn Spending on Holiday Decorations and Related Electricity Costs

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Connecticut Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

For the period November 23 through January 1 for each year from 2021-2025, across all University of Connecticut campuses:
1. Any and all records, invoices, purchase orders, receipts, memos, and reports related to the purchase of holiday decorations and holiday lighting.
2. Any and all records, invoices, receipts, memos, emails, correspondence,  and reports related to the cost of holiday lighting installation. 
3. Any and all records, invoices, purchase orders, receipts, memos, emails, correspondence, and reports related to estimated electricity costs associated with illuminating holiday lighting.
4. Any and all records, invoices, memos, emails, correspondence, and reports related to the daily operating hours for holiday lighting, including how long lighting is illuminated each day.

I also request that, if possible and pursuant to Conn. Gen. Stat. § 1-212(d), fees be waived as I believe this request is in the public interest and not made for commercial gain. The requested documents will be made available to the public at MuckRock.com.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 4 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Julianna D'Addona

title: Privacy Act and FOIA Request — All Records, Recordings, and Transcripts Pertaining to Ido Samuelson (National Security Agency)

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

I hereby request, pursuant to the Freedom of Information 
Act, 5 U.S.C. § 552, all records, files, documents, 
communications, assessments, reports, and information 
of any kind referencing or relating to me:

Full Legal Name: Ido Samuelson
Current Address: 1811 S Quebec Way, Apt #217, 
Denver, Colorado 80231

This request includes but is not limited to:

1. All records, files, and documents of any kind 
referencing my name, identity, or activities

2. All audio recordings, video recordings, and 
transcripts of any kind in which I appear, 
am referenced, or am a subject

3. All surveillance records, monitoring logs, and 
contact reports referencing me

4. All intelligence assessments, threat assessments, 
and security evaluations referencing me

5. All interagency communications referencing me

6. All records related to any contact, outreach, or 
communication between any employee, contractor, 
or agent of this agency and me

7. All records related to any coordination with 
private employers, contractors, or other government 
agencies regarding me or my employment

8. All records related to my employment at or 
contracting with any entity including but not 
limited to: Aptiv PLC, 4D Security Solutions Inc., 
mPrest Systems Ltd., EPAM Systems Inc., and Jet.com

9. All records held in any system of records, 
intelligence databases, security assessment 
databases, or contact logs containing my name 
or identifying information

10. All records related to any threat assessments, 
designations, or classifications applied to me 
by this agency or shared with this agency by 
any other government agency or private entity

This request covers all records regardless of format, 
classification level, or storage medium, including 
but not limited to: paper documents, electronic files, 
audio recordings, video recordings, transcripts, 
emails, memoranda, reports, and databases.

Date range: January 1, 2004 to present.

If any records are

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Ido Samuelson
